signatureMove.name: Ankle Biter
signatureMove.extraText: This attack deals Null damage against models which are further than 1" away.

abilities.name: Lance
abilities.description: If this character deals Slicing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to {Null}. If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Jousting Shield
abilities.description: Reduce Piercing and Impact Dmg suffered by -1.

abilities.name: Digger
abilities.description: When this model takes a Harvest action, flip an Arcane Card and reduce the Depth Value by X, where X is the value of the card. Catastrophe: All models within a 3" pulse suffer 2 Magical Dmg.

abilities.name: Foul Gases
abilities.description: All models within the pulse suffer 2 Magical Dmg.

abilities.name: Chaaarge!!
abilities.description: Move this model 4" directly towards target enemy model. If this character's next action this turn is a Melee Attack against the same target it deals +2 Dmg.
